UnitAbilities.Title: Advanced Guardian Drone
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a ranged attack targets the bearer, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Command-link Drone (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly T’au Empire unit is within 6" of the bearer, each time you select that unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Agile Combatant
UnitAbilities.Text: This model is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

UnitAbilities.Title: Hero of the Empire (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly T’au Empire unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

Infos.Title: SUPREME COMMANDER
Infos.Text: If this model is in your army, it must be your Warlord.

UnitAbilities.Title: Way of the Short Blade
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within 9", add 1 to the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Puretide's Teachings
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when it is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

Infos.Title: INDEPENDENT POWER
Infos.Text: If your army includes Commander Farsight, it cannot include any Ethereal units, if your army includes any Etheral units, it cannot include Commander Farsight.

UnitAbilities.Title: Trail Finding
UnitAbilities.Text: In your opponent’s Movement phase, if an enemy unit ends a move within 8" of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, this unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

UnitAbilities.Title: Kroot Ambush
UnitAbilities.Text: After both players have deployed their armies, you can redeploy this model’s unit and one other friendly Kroot unit. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

UnitAbilities.Title: War Leader
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when it is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Root of Honour
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly Kroot unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

UnitAbilities.Title: Ritual Butchery
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Rites of Feasting
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability. If that unit destroys one or more enemy units in the Fight phase, until the end of the battle, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Advanced Scouting
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that hits an enemy unit, until the end of the turn, each time another Kroot model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fire and Fade
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this model is not eligible to declare a charge.

Infos.Title: Bodyguard
Infos.Text: If this unit has a Starting Strength of 20, you can attach up to two Leader units to it instead of one, provided those Leaders are not duplicates (e.g you cannot attack two War Shapers to this unit). If you do, and this unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units with their original Starting Strengths.

UnitAbilities.Title: Kroot Packmates
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per turn, in your opponent's Shooting phase, when a friendly Kroot Infantry unit within 6" of this unit is selected as the target of an attack, one unit from your army with this ability can use it. If it does, after that enemy unit has finished making its attacks, that unit with this ability can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

UnitAbilities.Title: Rapid Deployment
UnitAbilities.Text: Units can disembark from this Transport after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally in the remainder of the turn.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT

This model has a transport capacity of 12 T’au Empire

UnitAbilities.Title: Ground Strike Fighter
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit that cannot Fly, add 1 to the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Pulse Bombs
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, select one visible enemy unit (excluding Lone Operative units) within 24" of this unit, and roll six D6 for that unit: for each 4+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fortification
UnitAbilities.Text:
While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more Fortifications from your army:
	▪ That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
	▪ Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle-shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

UnitAbilities.Title: Tidewall Cover
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Fortification, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

UnitAbilities.Title: Tidewall Defence Platform
UnitAbilities.Text: If equipped with a Tidewall defence platform, this Fortification has a Wounds characteristic of 15.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 11 T’au Empire Infantry models. It cannot transport Battlesuit, Kroot or Vespid Stingwings models. If this model is equipped with a Tidewall defence platform, it has a transport capacity of 22 T’au Infantry models instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Droneport
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this Fortification is selected to shoot, its drone defenders weapon will target and resolve attacks against every enemy unit that is an eligible target to this Fortification.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fortification
UnitAbilities.Text:
While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more Fortifications from your army:
	▪ That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

	▪ Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle-shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

UnitAbilities.Title: Tidewall Cover
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Fortification, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 11 T’au Empire Infantry models. It cannot transport Battlesuit, Kroot or Vespid Stingwings models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Heavy Walker
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over models (excluding Titanic models) and terrain features that are 4" or less in height as if they were not there.

UnitAbilities.Title: Support System
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Titan-killer
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a Titanic or Towering unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, subtract 3 from this models Objective Control characteristic, and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Pech’ra
UnitAbilities.Text: Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Bounty Hunters
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of the battle, select one unit from your opponent’s army. Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets that unit, that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] and [PRECISION] abilities.

Options: heavy rail cannon array and fragmentation cluster shell launcher

UnitAbilities.Title: Coordinated Strike
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is a Guided unit, each time it makes an attack that targets its Spotted unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Super-heavy Walker
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over models (excluding Titanic models) and terrain features that are 4" or less in height as if they were not there.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-10 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, subtract 5 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Transport Bay
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer has the Transport keyword and has a transport capacity of 12 Tactical Drones models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Strafing Run
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks that cannot Fly. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-6 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Titan Hunter
UnitAbilities.Text: This model’s twin heavy rail cannon and seeker missiles have the [ANTI-TITANIC 3+] ability while targeting a unit within half range.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-6 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Aggressive Deployment
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this Transport this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Air Caste Colossus
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time you target this model with a Stratagem, you must spend three times that Stratagem’s stated CP cost to do so.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-20 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-20 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text:
This model has a transport capacity of all of the following:
	▪ 200 T’au Empire Infantry or Tactical Drone models
	▪ 4 Devilfish, Sky Ray Gunship or Hammerhead models
	▪ 8 Battlesuit models with a Wounds characteristic of 9 or less

UnitAbilities.Title: Kroot Linebreakers
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it, then roll one D6 for each model in this unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit, for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as a result of these mortal wounds, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

Options: gun drone with twin pulse carbine

UnitAbilities.Title: Forward Observers
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, each time a ranged attack is made by a model in a Guided unit that targets their Spotted unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Marker Drone
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer’s unit has the Markerlight keyword and can act as an Observer unit for another unit even if it Advanced this turn.

UnitAbilities.Title: Homing Beacon
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, you can use the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP. The target must be set up within 3" of the bearer’s unit and more than 8" away from all enemy units.

UnitAbilities.Title: Designer’s Note
UnitAbilities.Text: Place a Homing Beacon token next to this unit, removing it once this ability is used.

InitalWargear: MV15 gun drone with twin pulse blaster
MV15 gun drone with twin pulse blaster

WargearDefinitions.Key: MV15 gun drone with twin pulse blaster

UnitAbilities.Title: Exemplars of Mont’ka
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] and [IGNORES COVER] abilities.

UnitAbilities.Title: Neocapacitor Shields
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of your opponent’s Charge phase, you can select one visible enemy unit (excluding Monster and Vehicle units) within 12" of this unit. That unit must take a Battle-shock test and, until the end of the turn, subtract 1 from Charge rolls made for that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Retro-thrusters
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of the Fight phase, if this unit was eligible to fight this  phase, this unit can either make a Normal  move of up to 6" or a Fall Back move.

UnitAbilities.Title: MV15 Gun Drone
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer is equipped with 1 twin pulse blaster.

Weapons.Name: MV15 gun drone with twin pulse blaster

Rule.Title: EXPERT FIELDCRAFT
Rule.Text: In your Shooting phase, when a friendly Pathfinder Team/Stealth Battlesuits unit is selected to shoot, those ranged attacks do not prevent your unit from being hidden.

Stratagems.Name: Marker Beacon
Stratagems.When: End of your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One friendly Pathfinder Team/Stealth Battlesuits unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one objective your unit is controlling. That objective is secured.

Stratagems.Name: Microdrone Support
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Pathfinder Team/Stealth Battlesuits unit starts an action.
Stratagems.Target: That Pathfinder Team/Stealth Battlesuits unit.
Stratagems.Effect: That action does not prevent your unit from being eligible to shoot.

Stratagems.Name: Autoreactive Camouflage
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly Pathfinder Team/Stealth Battlesuits unit, if that friendly unit is hidden.
Stratagems.Target: That Pathfinder Team/Stealth Battlesuits unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit has +1 Sv.

Enhancements.Name: Negation Emitters
Enhancements.Description: Stealth Battlesuits unit only. This unit has -3" detection range.

Enhancements.Name: Unmasking Suite
Enhancements.Description: Ghostkeel Battlesuit/Pathfinder Team/Stealth Battlesuits unit only. When this unit is selected to shoot, you can select one enemy unit within 24" of this unit. That enemy unit has +9" detection range until this unit has shot.

AddedAbilities.Title: EXPERT FIELDCRAFT
AddedAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, when a friendly Pathfinder Team/Stealth Battlesuits unit is selected to shoot, those ranged attacks do not prevent your unit from being hidden.

Rule.Restrictions: This detachment has the AUXILIARIES tag and cannot be taken with another AUXILIARIES detachment.
Rule.Title: INTEGRATED COMMAND STRUCTURE
Rule.Text:
Friendly Kroot/Vespid Stingwings units have the following ability:

Harnessed Alien Instincts: In your Shooting phase, this unit can select one visible enemy unit within 12". That enemy unit is prey-marked:
	▪ While a unit is prey-marked, that unit has +3" detection range.

Friendly Ghostkeel Battlesuit/Stealth Battlesuits units have the following ability:

Localised Stealth Projectors (Aura): When a friendly Kroot/Vespid Stingwings unit within 6" of this unit has shot, those attacks do not prevent that unit from being hidden.

Stratagems.Name: Experimental Modifications
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when a friendly Kroot/Vespid Stingwings unit is selected to attack.
Stratagems.Target: That Kroot/Vespid Stingwings unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit’s attacks have +1 AP.

Stratagems.Name: Alien Expertise
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Kroot/Vespid Stingwings unit is selected to make an advance move.
Stratagems.Target: That Kroot/Vespid Stingwings unit.
Stratagems.Effect: That move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to declare a charge.

Stratagems.Name: Guided by Unity
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly T'au Empire unit (excluding Kroot/Vespid Stingwings units) is selected to shoot.
Stratagems.Target: That T'au Empire unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit’s ranged attacks that target a unit within 9" of a friendly Kroot/Vespid Stingwings unit have [LETHAL HITS].

Enhancements.Name: Student of Kauyon
Enhancements.Description: Kroot Shaper model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select up to three friendly Kroot Carnivores/Farstalkers units. Those units have Deep Strike.

Enhancements.Name: Admired Leader
Enhancements.Description: T'au Empire model only (excluding Kroot models). In your Command phase, you can select one Kroot/Vespid Stingwings unit within 12" of this model. If you do, that unit has +1 Ld and OC until the start of your next Command phase.

AddedAbilities.Title: Harnessed Alien Instincts
AddedAbilities.Text:
In your Shooting phase, this unit can select one visible enemy unit within 12". That enemy unit is prey-marked:
	▪ While a unit is prey-marked, that unit has +3" detection range.

AddedAbilities.Title: Harnessed Alien Instincts
AddedAbilities.Text:
In your Shooting phase, this unit can select one visible enemy unit within 12". That enemy unit is prey-marked:
	▪ While a unit is prey-marked, that unit has +3" detection range.

AddedAbilities.Title: Localised Stealth Projectors (Aura)
AddedAbilities.Text: When a friendly Kroot/Vespid Stingwings unit within 6" of this unit has shot, those attacks do not prevent that unit from being hidden.

Rule.Restrictions: This detachment has the RETALIATION tag and cannot be taken with another RETALIATION detachment.
Rule.Title: SUPERIOR CRAFTSMANSHIP
Rule.Text: Friendly Battlesuit Character units’ ranged attacks have +6" R.

Stratagems.Name: Experimental Ammunition
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Battlesuit Character unit is selected to shoot.
Stratagems.Target: That Battlesuit Character unit.
Stratagems.Effect:
Your unit’s ranged attacks have:
	▪ +1 S.
	▪ OR: +1 S, AP and [HAZARDOUS].

Enhancements.Name: Thermoneutronic Projector
Enhancements.Description:
Battlesuit model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, select one of this model’s T’au Flamer weapons. That weapon’s attacks have:
	▪ +2 S
	▪ +1 AP and D.

Enhancements.Name: Plasma Accelerator Rifle
Enhancements.Description:
Battlesuit model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, select one of this model’s Plasma Rifle weapons. That weapon’s attacks have:
	▪ +2 S
	▪ +1 A, AP and D.

Enhancements.Name: Supernova Launcher
Enhancements.Description:
Battlesuit model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, select one of this model’s Airbursting Fragmentation Projector weapons. That weapon’s attacks have:
	▪ +3 S
	▪ +1 AP and D.

AddedAbilities.Title: SUPERIOR CRAFTSMANSHIP
AddedAbilities.Text: Friendly Battlesuit Character units’ ranged attacks have +6" R.

Rule.Title: PATIENT HUNTER
Rule.Text: During the third, fourth and fifth battle rounds, ranged weapons equipped by T'au Empire models from your army have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. During the third, fourth and fifth battle rounds, while a unit is a Guided unit (see For the Greater Good), each time a ranged attack is made by a model in that unit that targets a Spotted unit, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill characteristic and/or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

Stratagems.Name: A Tempting Trap
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One T’au Empire unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase. The first time you use this Stratagem, you must also select one objective marker that is not in your opponent's deployment zone; until the end of the battle, this becomes your Trap objective marker.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit within range of your Trap objective marker, add 1 to the Wound roll.
Stratagems.Restrictions: You cannot use this Stratagem during the first or second battle rounds.

Stratagems.Name: Point-blank Ambush
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One T’au Empire unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit within 9", improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
Stratagems.Restrictions: You cannot use this Stratagem during the first or second battle rounds.

Stratagems.Name: Coordinate to Engage
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One T’au Empire unit from your army that has just been selected as an Observer unit (see For the Greater Good).
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets their Spotted unit, improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of that attack by 1 and, if your unit has the Markerlight keyword, that attack has the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

Stratagems.Name: Combat Embarkation
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has declared a charge.
Stratagems.Target: One T’au Empire Infantry unit from your army that was selected as one of the targets of that charge, and one friendly Transport.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can embark within that Transport.
Stratagems.Restrictions: RESTRICTIONS: Every model in your T’au Empire Infantry unit must be within 3" of that Transport and there must be sufficient transport capacity to embark the entire unit.

Stratagems.Name: Photon Grenades
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its charge target.
Stratagems.Target: One T’au Empire Grenades unit from your army that was selected as one of the targets of that charge.
Stratagems.Effect: That enemy unit must immediately take a Battle-shock test, and until the end of the phase, subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that enemy unit.

Stratagems.Name: Wall of Mirrors
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Stealth, GhostKeel or Commander Shadowsun unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.
Stratagems.Restrictions: You cannot target a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

Enhancements.Name: Exemplar of the Kauyon
Enhancements.Description: Tau Empire model only (excluding Kroot Shaper models). While the bearer is leading a unit, the Patient Hunter Detachment rule applies to that unit from the second battle round onwards instead of the third.

Enhancements.Name: Precision of the Patient Hunter
Enhancements.Description: Tau Empire model only. Each time the bearer makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. From the third battle round onwards, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

Enhancements.Name: Solid-Image Projection Unit
Enhancements.Description: Tau Empire model only. After both players have deploted their armies, select up to three T’au Empire units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

Enhancements.Name: Through Unity, Devastation
Enhancements.Description: T'au Empire model only (excluding Kroot Shaper models). While the bearer is leading a unit, each time that unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in a Guided unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability while targeting their Spotted unit.

Rule.Title: KILLING BLOW
Rule.Text: During the first, second and third battle rounds, ranged weapons equipped by T'au Empire models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability. During the first, second and third battle rounds, while a unit is a Guided unit (see For the Greater Good), its ranged weapons have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

Stratagems.Name: Pinpoint Counter-Offensive
Stratagems.When: Any phase.
Stratagems.Target: One T’au Empire unit (excluding Kroot units) from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a T’au Empire unit (excluding Kroot units) from your army makes an attack that targets the enemy unit that just destroyed your unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

Stratagems.Name: Aggressive Mobility
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One T’au Empire unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

Stratagems.Name: Focused Fire
Stratagems.When: Start of your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: Two T’au Empire units from your army that have not been selected to shoot this phase, and one enemy unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in either of your units makes an attack, it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target for that attack), and when resolving that attack, improve the armour Penetration characteristic by 1.
Stratagems.Restrictions: You cannot use this Stratagem during the fourth or fifth battle rounds.

Stratagems.Name: Combat Debarkation
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One T’au Empire Infantry unit from your army that disembarked from a Transport this turn.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets the closest enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Pulse Onslaught
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One T’au Empire Infantry unit from your army that has just shot, and one enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) hit by one or more of those attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of your opponent's next turn that enemy unit is shaken. While a unit is shaken, subtract 2 from it Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for it.

Stratagems.Name: Counterfire Defence Systems
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One T’au Empire unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allowcated to your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

Enhancements.Name: Exemplar of the Mont'ka
Enhancements.Description: Tau Empire model only (excluding Kroot Shaper models). While the bearer is leading a unit, the Killing Blow Detachment rule applies to that unit during the fourth battle round as well.

Enhancements.Name: Strike Swiftly
Enhancements.Description: T'au Empire model only. In the Resolve Pre-battle Abilities step, you can select up to two friendly T'au Empire units within 6" of this model that do not have the Scouts ability. Until the end of the battle, all models in the selected units have the Scouts 6" ability.

Enhancements.Name: Strategic Conqueror
Enhancements.Description: Tau Empire model only. At the start of the first battle round, before the first turn begins, select one objective marker on the battlefield. While a friendly T’au Empire model is within range of that objective marker and the bearer is on the battlefield, add 1 to that friendly model's Objective Control characteristic.

Enhancements.Name: Coordinated Exploitation
Enhancements.Description: T'au Empire model only (excluding Kroot Shaper models). While the bearer is leading a unit, each time that unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in a Guided unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability while targeting their Spotted unit.

Rule.Title: BONDED HEROES
Rule.Text: Each time a T'au Empire Battlesuit model from your army makes a ranged attack that targets a unit within 12", improve the Strength characteristic of that attack by 1. If that attack targets a unit within 8", improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1 as well.

Stratagems.Name: Fail-safe Detonator
Stratagems.When: Any phase, just after a T’au Empire Battlesuit model from your army is destroyed.
Stratagems.Target: That destroyed model's unit. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even if that unit was just destroyed.
Stratagems.Effect: Before removing your model from play, if it has the Deadly Demise ability, do not roll for that ability; instead, you can choose whether the result of that roll is a 1 or a 6. If your model does not have the Deadly Demise ability, roll one D6 for each unit within 6" of it: on a 4+, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

Stratagems.Name: Stimm Injectors
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One T’au Empire Battlesuit unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

Stratagems.Name: The Shortened Blade
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One T’au Empire Battlesuit unit from your army that is arriving using the Deep Strike ability this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models.
Stratagems.Restrictions: A unit targeted with this Stratagem is not eligible to declare a change in the same turn.

Stratagems.Name: The Arro'kon Protocol
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One T’au Empire Battlesuit unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that contains 6 or more models, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability, if that attack targets an enemy unit that contains 11 or more models, it has the [SUSTAINED HITS 2] ability instead.

Stratagems.Name: The Torchstar Gambit
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One T’au Empire Battlesuit unit from your army that can Fly whose attacks have been resolved this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move. If it does, your unit cannot declare a charge this turn.

Stratagems.Name: Grav-Inhibitor Field
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has declared a charge.
Stratagems.Target: One T’au Empire Battlesuit unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge.
Stratagems.Effect: That enemy unit must immeadiately take a Battle-shock test and you must roll one D6 for each model in that enemy unit: for each 6, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

Enhancements.Name: Puretide Engram Neurochip
Enhancements.Description: T'au Empire Battlesuit model only. Each time you target the bearer’s unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

Enhancements.Name: Starflare Ignition System
Enhancements.Description: Tau Empire Battlesuit model only. At the end of your opponent’s turn, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove that unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Enhancements.Name: Internal Grenade Racks
Enhancements.Description: Tau Empire Battlesuit model only. The bearer has the Grenades keyword, and each time the bearer ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit that it moved over during that move. If you do, roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

Enhancements.Name: Prototype Weapon System
Enhancements.Description: Tau Empire Battlesuit model only. Each time the bearer is selected to shoot, select either the [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. Until those attacks are resolved, ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the selected ability.

Rule.Title: HUNTER'S INSTINCTS
Rule.Text:
Hunter'S INSTINCTS
Each time a Kroot model from your army makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if the target of that attack is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if the target of that attack is Below Half-strength.

SKIRMISH FIGHTERS
Kroot models from your army have a 6+ invulnerable save against melee attacks and a 5+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks.

KEYWORDS
If you select this Detachment, Kroot Carnivore units from your army have the Battleline keyword.

Stratagems.Name: Join the Hunt
Stratagems.Category: KROOT HUNTING PACK - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Any phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Kroot Infantry or Kroot Hounds unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
Stratagems.Effect: Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Strategic Reserves, at its Starting Strength.
Stratagems.Restrictions: This Stratagem cannot be used to return destroyed Character units to Attached units. You can only use this Stratagem once per battle.

Stratagems.Name: A Trap Well Laid
Stratagems.Category: KROOT HUNTING PACK - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Kroot unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: After your unit has resolved its attacks this phase, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a Kroot model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, unless the attacking unit is Battle-shocked, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Stratagems.Name: EMP Grenades
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy Vehicle unit is selected to shoot or fight.
Stratagems.Target: One Kroot Grenades unit from your army within 8" of that enemy Vehicle unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Unit the end of the phase, worsen the Weapon Skill and Ballistic Skill characteristics of that enemy Vehicle unit's weapons by 1.

Stratagems.Name: The Grisly Feast
Stratagems.Category: KROOT HUNTING PACK - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Kroot unit from your army that destroyed one or more enemy units this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: In your opponent's next Command phase, each enemy unit within 6" of your unit must take a Battle-shock test. If the unit taking that test is Below Half-strength, subtract 1 from that test. Enemy units affected by this Stratagem do not need to take any other Battle-shock tests in the same phase.

Stratagems.Name: Guerrilla Warriors
Stratagems.Category: KROOT HUNTING PACK - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, just after a Kroot unit from your army Falls Back.
Stratagems.Target: That Kroot unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is elligible to shoot and declare a charge.

Stratagems.Name: Hidden Hunters
Stratagems.Category: KROOT HUNTING PACK - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Kroot unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

Enhancements.Name: Kroothawk Flock
Enhancements.Description: Kroot model only. Ranged weapons equipped by the models in the bearer's unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability, and enemy units that are setup on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" horizontally of the bearer.

Enhancements.Name: Nomadic Hunter
Enhancements.Description: Kroot Trail Shaper model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 3" to the Move characteristic of the models in that unit and ranged weapons equipped by the models in that unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

Enhancements.Name: Root-Carved Weapons
Enhancements.Description: Kroot War Shaper model only. All weapons equipped by the bearer have the [PRECISION] and [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] abilities.

Enhancements.Name: Borthrod Gland
Enhancements.Description: Kroot Flesh Shaper model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

ArmyRules.Title: FOR THE GREATER GOOD
ArmyRules.Text:
If your Army Faction is T'au Empire, at the start of your Shooting phase you can select units from your army with this ability to become Observer units.

During your Shooting phase, for each Observer unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase and is eligible to shoot (excluding Fortification and Battle-shocked units) select one enemy unit that is visible to be marked as their Spotted unit until the end of the phase. Each enemy unit can only be marked as a Spotted unit once per phase.

Units from your army with the For the Greater Good ability (excluding Observer units) are Guided units while targeting one or more Spotted units.

Until the end of the phase, each time a model from your army in a Guided unit makes an attack that targets a Spotted unit, improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of that attack by 1 and, if the Spotted unit was marked by an Observer unit that has the Markerlight keyword, that attack has the [IGNORES COVER] ability.
